method_notes: Phase-1 base built from impact/gc_ch00..42.impact.json (43 files, complete); final verdicts are defense-adjusted. PHASE-2 UPDATE: the 97 claims with final verdict 'disputed' were adjudicated under ADJUDICATION_CHARTER.md v1.1-frozen (23 dossiers, adjudication/D01..D23.ruling.json); the 81 accusatory as-written rulings plus 1 conditional premise were re-scored by the impact stage into impact_adjudicated objects (24 chapters). Per charter section 11, Phase-2 rulings are THE FINAL WORD on these 97 claims and this file says so explicitly (see adjudication_layer.status). LAYER RULE: Phase-1 confirmed discrepancies (65, mostly anachronistic) and Phase-2 as-written failures (81) are distinct layers with distinct epistemics and are NEVER summed into one headline number. Within the 81, failing-component classes fact/frame/motive are reported separately and never aggregated. Phase-1 keys are preserved below unchanged as the historical layer; keys fully superseded carry a superseded_by pointer.

notable.GC-14-032: contradicted -> supported (Bishop of Durham buying Tyndale Bibles: defense vindicated the account)
notable.GC-04-036: contradicted -> anachronistic (Sabbath as cause of Waldensian separation: traced to Andrews/Wylie)
notable.GC-15-152: misquotation -> anachronistic (Voltaire 'one man' quote: period-inherited attribution)
notable.GC-15-155: misquotation -> anachronistic ('Bible is an anvil' attribution)
notable.GC-37-022: misquotation -> unverifiable (defense located the quote tradition)

verdicts_final.note: Verification-stage vocabulary. The 97 'disputed' were re-opened and resolved by Phase-2 adjudication; see adjudication_layer for their final graded rulings.

claim_type_distribution_manifest.note: sums of manifest.json by_type; total 4456 vs 4443 extracted, manifest-internal variance ~0.3%

key_metrics.note: Phase-1 layer metrics, preserved. The disputed-bucket entries are superseded by adjudication_layer.
key_metrics.quote_layer: of 1283 attributed_quote claims, zero misquotation verdicts survived defense (2 downgraded to anachronistic in ch15, 1 reversed in ch37, 1 reversed in ch04)

disputed_scored.note: Phase-1 impact scores for 66 high-stakes disputed claims. Superseded: all 97 disputed claims received final graded rulings in Phase 2, and the 81 accusatory outcomes were re-scored (impact_adjudicated). Full Phase-1 objects remain in git history and in the impact files under the untouched 'impact' key.

per_chapter.title: The Bible And The French Revolution

by_arc.note: Phase-1 layer. Adjudication-layer per-arc aggregation lives in adjudication_layer.rescore.by_arc.

clusters.name: sabbath_continuity_successionism
clusters.description: Unbroken chain of seventh-day Sabbath keepers from apostles through the Middle Ages (Waldenses, Culdees, Armenians, hidden remnant). Traced to J.N. Andrews, History of the Sabbath (1873), ch. 'Traces of the Sabbath During the Dark Ages', and Wylie/Muston. Rejected by modern scholarship incl. Ball, The Seventh-Day Men (Clarendon 1994). PHASE-2: GC-03-032 discredited as written / well-supported weakened (gap 4); GC-35-086 improbable with weakened version only genuinely-open (Bohemian margin).

clusters.name: sunday_change_by_rome
clusters.description: Rome as originator of Sunday observance and author of the Sabbath-to-Sunday change. PHASE-2 (D02): single-agency origination improbable as written; weakened 'leading documented role in demoting the Sabbath' probable; 'no scriptural command for Sunday' well-supported across the spectrum; apostolic-vs-post-apostolic origin genuinely open (GC-03-050).

clusters.name: rome_and_the_bible
clusters.description: Blanket claims that Rome prohibited/withheld the Bible from the people for centuries (and still does, in 1911 present tense). PHASE-2 (D07): all six adjudicated claims improbable/discredited as written, all six weakened versions well-supported (documented regional restriction, post-Tridentine Italian/Spanish ban per Fragnito, magisterial interpretation monopoly); GC-35-017 discredited against the 1897-1911 approved-version regime.

clusters.name: chronology_1844
clusters.description: The 457 BC / AD 27 / AD 31 / AD 34 / 1844 chain. PHASE-2 (D01): one out-of-scope conditional premise (GC-18-058), one probable (GC-18-062), 12 improbable, 2 discredited epistemic absolutes (GC-18-078, GC-26-069). Ten accusatory rulings inherit the single 457 BC anchor (GC-18-060); independent failure points besides the anchor: GC-18-071 (astronomy excludes AD 31), GC-18-078 and GC-26-069 (frame absolutes). Arithmetic itself verified correct; weakened versions probable/well-supported throughout.
source_lineage: S. Bliss, Memoirs of William Miller

clusters.name: scheme_538_1798
clusters.description: 1260-year papal supremacy dated AD 538-1798. Historicist construct (Uriah Smith lineage); only the 1798 terminus (capture of Pius VI) is an independently anchored event. Phase-1 layer; not part of the disputed pool, unchanged by Phase 2.

clusters.name: waldensian_antiquity_and_mission
clusters.description: Waldensian apostolic antiquity, thousand-year Alpine continuity, missionary-school idealizations, continuity bridges. Phase-1 anachronistic core (Wylie/Muston/Perrin on misdated documents). PHASE-2 (D12): university-education, sewn-garment, untraceability, sola-fide and Reformation-seeding claims improbable as written; weakened kernels (clandestine barbes, memorized Scripture, machinery-of-merit rejection, Bohemian channel) probable/well-supported.

clusters.name: celtic_church_romanticism
clusters.description: Iona/Culdee narrative: early British Christianity independent of Rome, Sabbath-keeping, destroyed by papal aggression; Columba's Scotland lineage. 19th-century Protestant romanticism. Phase-1 layer, unchanged.

clusters.name: reformation_embellishments
clusters.description: Dramatized episodes and hero/villain sharpening inherited from D'Aubigne and Wylie. Event cores usually solid; the coloring is period-inherited. PHASE-2 additions (D09, D22, D23): Scala Sancta thunder-voice improbable (kernel genuinely-open); Muntzer ambition-motive improbable (motive class); 'not the slightest foundation' Peasants'-War absolute improbable; Wycliffe no-predecessors absolute improbable; Hus Bohemian prologue (Comenius legend layer) improbable as written with documented substrates; 'Here I stand' genuinely open (GC-08-088).

clusters.name: surviving_contradicted
clusters.description: The only two accusatory verdicts of the Phase-1 'contradicted' class that survived the defense pass. Both are isolated slips, neither load-bearing. Unchanged by Phase 2.

clusters.name: inflated_statistics
clusters.description: Casualty and scale figures taken from period sources at their high end. PHASE-2 (D15, D17, D18, D19): Lisbon 60k/90k improbable vs modern 30-40k (Pereira); 'millions of martyrs' improbable vs archival tens of thousands judicial + hundreds of thousands massacre-inclusive (Monter, Contreras-Henningsen); Wesley half-million improbable vs ~135k members / 350-450k community (Field); 'great numbers' of early martyrs vindicated as probable (GC-02-008).

clusters.name: ussher_chronology_frame
clusters.description: Ussher-style biblical chronology as narrative frame. PHASE-2 (D13): 'first 2500 years of human history' discredited as world history (gap 4); Mosaic composition anchor improbable (GC-00-007, inherited by GC-00-008 and GC-01-097); Joel dating genuinely open (GC-17-066).

clusters.name: immortality_of_soul_genealogy
clusters.description: Natural immortality and eternal torment as pagan doctrine channelled through Rome. PHASE-2 (D08): pagan-origin core of natural immortality vindicated as well-supported (Cullmann line); Rome-as-agent attribution improbable (patristic, pre-papal entry: Athenagoras, Tertullian, Augustine); 'only defense' exclusive improbable; receptivity-to-spiritualism mechanism probable (Braude).

clusters.name: hebrews_pauline_authorship
clusters.description: Paul named as author of Hebrews; standard 19th-century attribution, abandoned by modern scholarship. Phase-1 layer, unchanged.

clusters.name: jerusalem_ad70
clusters.description: AD 70 narrative details. PHASE-2 (D05, D16): 'not one Christian perished' improbable with weakened version only genuinely-open (pedigree: Newton/Clarke argument from silence); Pella flight itself genuinely open (Brandon vs Koester/Bourgel); Titus's Olivet 'not one stone' order improbable (contradicted by BJ 6.228); Titus's intent scenes genuinely open (Josephus vs Sulpicius/Tacitus standoff).

clusters.name: french_revolution_rev11
clusters.description: French Revolution as fulfilment of Revelation 11. PHASE-2 (D04): the 3.5-year construction discredited as written ('the same body' structurally unsatisfiable: Convention dissolved Oct 1795; law of 21 Feb 1795 breaks the interval; 1911 revisers themselves found no decrees); 'Crush the Wretch = Christ' gloss improbable vs Voltaire scholarship; Louis XV deluge quote improbable (Pompadour attribution). All three weakened versions well-supported. Construction was expositor-tradition standard (Croly 1827, U. Smith), NOT period academic historiography (Thiers/Mignet/Alison already described the staged 1794-95 restoration).

clusters.name: millerite_movement_framing
clusters.description: The awakening as simultaneous independent discovery; Litch's 1840 prediction; Lisbon signs. PHASE-2 (D03, D15): Litch quotation vindicated well-supported as written (GC-18-119, reversal in the book's favor); the 11-Aug-1840 'exact fulfilment' improbable (Convention of London 15 July; ultimatum 16-19 Aug); 'isolated bodies... solely by the study of the Scriptures' improbable vs documented networks (Albury, Irving's Lacunza translation), weakened convergence probable.
clusters.dominant_verdict: mixed: 1 vindicated, rest improbable as written (Phase-2)

strongest_defenses.note: contradicted -> supported: the Bishop of Durham Bible-buying episode was vindicated
misquotation withdrawn after the defense located the quotation tradition
contradicted -> anachronistic: traced to Andrews/Wylie, removing the fabrication charge
misquotation -> anachronistic: Voltaire attribution standard in 19th-c. literature
defense honestly tested the anachronism excuse and rejected it: period sources (Wellcome 1874, Irving 1827) spell 'Ben-Ezra' correctly, so the slip is White's own

defense_pass_highlights.systemic_observation: The defense pass moved every misquotation off the books (4 -> 0) and reduced contradicted from 4 to 2; 96.9% of surviving accusatory verdicts are anachronistic, i.e. inherited from the era's historiography rather than invented.

adjudication_layer.status: FINAL. Per ADJUDICATION_CHARTER.md section 11, Phase-2 rulings are the final word on the 97 formerly-disputed claims; the report and all downstream consumers read them as such. Phase-1 files remain untouched; impact re-scores live under the new impact_adjudicated key beside the preserved Phase-1 impact objects.
adjudication_layer.layer_separation_rule: Phase-1 confirmed discrepancies (65: anachronistic 63, contradicted 2) and Phase-2 as-written accusatory rulings (81: improbable 72, discredited 9) are separate layers with different epistemics (inherited-source errors vs graded evidence rulings on formerly-open questions). They are never summed. Within the 81, failing-component classes are reported separately: fact 75, frame 4, motive 2 - never one headline number.
adjudication_layer.framing_gap_headline: First-class result: 73 of 81 accusatory as-written rulings (90%) have weakened versions ruled probable or well-supported. Every discredited ruling (9) carries the maximum gap of 4. The corpus pattern - low as-written, high weakened - indicts the book's rhetoric (universals, exclusives, motive attributions, epistemic absolutes) more than its factual substance. Exceptions (8 of 81) where the weakened version does NOT recover to probable/well-supported: GC-00-007 (Mosaic composition, weakened genuinely-open), GC-01-079 (zero AD-70 deaths, weakened genuinely-open), GC-01-101 (Olivet 'not one stone' order, weakened genuinely-open), GC-06-013 and GC-06-015 (Hus's mother scenes, weakened genuinely-open), GC-06-031 (English strangers' flight, weakened n/a - nothing survives softening), GC-07-036 (Scala Sancta thunder-voice, weakened genuinely-open), GC-35-086 (Waldensian Sabbath-keepers, weakened genuinely-open). In these eight the substance itself is unresolved or absent, not merely over-asserted.

failing_component_kind_81.note: Charter section 11: classes are distinct reported categories. The two frame discredits (GC-18-078 'fixed beyond question', GC-26-069 'stands without impeachment') are epistemic-absolute failures, not date errors; the two motive failures are undocumented intent attributions (Hus's mother's valuation, Muntzer's ambition).

chains.rule: Both numbers are always reported together; the inherited count is never headlined alone (charter section 11).
chains.d01_note: Within the 1844-chronology dossier the 14 accusatory rulings reduce to 4 independent failure points: the 457 BC anchor itself (GC-18-060), the astronomical exclusion of AD 31 (GC-18-071), and the two epistemic-absolute frames (GC-18-078, GC-26-069).

verifier_reversals_in_favor_of_book.note: disputed -> well-supported as written: Litch's 11-Aug-1840 calculation is quoted accurately, with his own hedges preserved and the 1838-vs-1840 refinement sequence correctly stated; Phase-1 'disputed' had conflated attribution accuracy with fulfilment validity.

adjudication overturned the Phase-1 verifier UPWARD on the persecution core: pre-Hus Bohemian Waldensian persecution is documented in Patschovsky's 14th-century inquisition records (Gallus of Neuhaus; ~15 executions in the surviving fragment, extrapolations to ~200 burned), which Phase 1 missed. The as-written absolute (forest worship, blanket burn-decree) remains improbable; the weakened version is well-supported.

conditional_premise.category_note: Fourth downstream category (charter v1.1 amendment): neither vindicated, nor discrepancy, nor open residue. GC-18-058 (the 70 weeks as subset of the 2300 days, common starting point) decomposes as entirely hermeneutic - a prophetic-structural synchronism historiography does not evaluate. It is load-bearing (centrality 5) for the sanctuary link of the thesis chain and is counted in NO impact column; downstream reporting presents it as a hermeneutic premise on which the empirical chain is conditional.

period_standard.definition: Tag for accusatory as-written rulings whose claim matched the standard sources of 1844/1911 (charter section 11), bridging Phase-1 'anachronistic' vocabulary. Two variants: 'period-scholarship' = matched the respectable historiography/reference scholarship of the era (Wylie, D'Aubigne, Milman, Lyell, Encyclopaedia Americana, Ussher/KJV-margin chronology, Comenius via Wylie); 'expositor-tradition' = matched only the confessional expositor/homiletic tradition (Croly 1827, Uriah Smith, Clarke/Newton commentary absolutes, denominational eulogy figures), which the era's own academic scholarship did NOT share.
period_standard.d04_distinction: Key case (D04): the 3.5-year Rev-11 construction (GC-15-142) was standard in historicist EXPOSITION (Croly 1827; Uriah Smith) but not in period academic historiography - Thiers, Mignet and Alison already narrated the staged 1794-1795 restoration, and the 1911 revision team's own search failed to find the decrees. Hence variant 'expositor-tradition', not 'period-scholarship'.

period_standard.excluded_note: GC-01-101 (D16) remains untagged: the ruling makes the tag conditional on verbatim confirmation of Milman's wording, which was blocked in-session. GC-05-107 (D23) untagged: its absolute exceeds even Wylie, who names Wycliffe's forerunners.

thesis_chain_status.commentary_ru: Абсолюты звена пали: «ни один христианин не погиб» (GC-01-079, improbable, load-bearing; ослабленная версия лишь genuinely-open), «Библию не признавали мерилом веры» (GC-02-053, discredited) и «субботу соблюдали все» (GC-03-032, discredited). Событийная основа — гонения, массовый приток номинальных обращённых, само бегство в Пеллу — стоит либо подтверждённой (GC-02-050, GC-02-038, GC-02-008 оправданы как probable), либо честно открытой (GC-01-084).

Самое повреждённое звено: апостольская древность и субботство вальденсов разрушены ещё в Фазе 1 (GC-04-001/034/046, GC-26-032, anachronistic, load-bearing), а адъюдикация добавила отказ протопротестантскому портрету (GC-04-082, GC-04-113 improbable) и субботнему остатку (GC-35-086, ослабленная версия лишь genuinely-open). Документированное ядро — тайные барбы, заученное Писание, гонения — подтверждается.

Ни одного load-bearing повреждения на 13 глав; адъюдикация сняла только орнаментальный слой (легенда о двух англичанах в Праге GC-06-027…032, Scala Sancta GC-07-036, абсолюты GC-05-107 и GC-10-066), а «На сём стою» осталось честно открытым (GC-08-088). Событийные ядра и цитатный слой звена подтверждены.

Как напечатано, хронология 457→1844 пала: якорь 457 г. до н.э. improbable (GC-18-060), 31 год исключён астрономией (GC-18-071), формулы «вне всякого сомнения» и «без опровержения» discredited (GC-18-078, GC-26-069); при этом десять звеньев наследуют один якорь, а не падают порознь, и framing_gap высок — на посылках эпохи вычисление внутренне точно (weakened well-supported). История самого движения почти вся подтверждена, включая реверс в пользу книги по цитате Литча (GC-18-119).

Единственный эмпирический вход звена — та же хронология, повторённая в гл. 23 (GC-23-008…012, все chain-inherited от GC-18-060), а его стержень GC-18-058 (70 седмин как часть 2300 дней) при декомпозиции оказался целиком герменевтическим и получил out-of-scope: это условная посылка, которую историография не оценивает. Само небесное святилище и суд — богословие вне проверки.

Генеалогические абсолюты пали: «суббота у всех христиан» discredited (GC-03-032), «субботу изменила папская власть» и «воскресенье возникло от Рима» improbable (GC-26-014/025, GC-35-057), Эдемское установление как история improbable (GC-25-051). Выживают ослабленные версии: документированная роль Рима в принижении субботы (probable), отсутствие библейской заповеди о воскресенье (well-supported, GC-35-103) и открытый вопрос об апостольском происхождении воскресенья (GC-03-050); богословский статус субботы — вне проверки.

Звено почти целиком состоит из будущего времени и богословия; из проверяемого адъюдикация оставила лишь периферию (избиение младенцев genuinely-open GC-42-032, «papal error» improbable GC-36-044, «withheld from the common people» improbable GC-37-029). Убедительность звена производна от звеньев 4–6, самостоятельной эмпирической опоры у него нет.
